heartbeatProtocol.notes: Agents send heartbeat every 10s. If lastHeartbeat >60s old, consider hung (not just waiting for 30min timeout)

priorityQueue.rules: User-interactive tasks (sessions_send responses, direct requests) jump the queue when at maxConcurrent. Background work (research, cleanup) waits.

notes: Track spawned agents here. Active = currently running. Completed = finished in last 24h. Clean up completed entries >24h old during heartbeats. Each active agent should include 'lastHeartbeat' timestamp and 'priority' field (user|background).
